# Hikvision / HiLook / PSIA-compatible RTSP paths.
/Streaming/Channels/101	Hikvision channel 1 main
/Streaming/Channels/102	Hikvision channel 1 sub
/Streaming/Channels/103	Hikvision channel 1 third
/Streaming/Channels/1	Hikvision channel 1 (short)
/Streaming/Channels/2	Hikvision channel 2 (short)
/Streaming/channels/101	Hikvision channel 1 main (lowercase)
/Streaming/Unicast/channels/101	Hikvision channel 1 unicast
/PSIA/Streaming/channels/0?videoCodecType=H.264	Hikvision PSIA channel 0 H.264
/PSIA/Streaming/channels/1	Hikvision PSIA channel 1
/PSIA/Streaming/channels/1?videoCodecType=MPEG4	Hikvision PSIA channel 1 MPEG-4
/PSIA/Streaming/channels/h264	Hikvision PSIA H.264
/ROH/channel/11	Hikvision NVR ROH channel 11
/h264/ch1/sub/	Hikvision ch1 sub
/CH001.sdp	Hikvision CH001.sdp
/ch001.sdp	Hikvision ch001.sdp
/ch01.264	Hikvision ch01.264
